artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: A Profile of the Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer highlight his production work.
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent artists and his release of a comprehensive sample pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has established a notable presence in the music industry through collaborations with prominent artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, creating a distinctive sound that has resonated with audiences and fellow artists alike.

In addition to his collaborative work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used in various productions.
This sample pack provides insight into his production techniques and has become a valuable resource for producers looking to incorporate his signature sounds into their own work.
Noizekid's contributions to the Latin electronic music scene have been recognized by his peers, with similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
